agent_scopes.mechanism: Two scopes: project (.opencode/agents/) and user-global (~/.config/opencode/agents/). Both scopes are loaded and coexist.

definition_format.mechanism: Markdown files with YAML frontmatter loaded from .opencode/agents/*.md (project) and ~/.config/opencode/agents/*.md (global). The loader glob accepts both agent/ and agents/ directory names and recurses. Frontmatter declares description (required), mode, model, permission, steps, temperature, top_p, color, and hidden; the markdown body becomes the system prompt.

invocation_patterns.mechanism: Agent name derives from the filename (configEntryNameFromPath). Agents with mode: primary can be selected as the session agent; agents with mode: subagent are invoked by other agents via description-driven matching; mode: all allows both.

model_selection.mechanism: Frontmatter model field selects a specific model alias or full model string for the agent, overriding the session default.

per_agent_mcp.mechanism: OpenCode agent frontmatter does not document a per-agent mcpServers field; agents inherit the workspace MCP configuration.

subagent_spawning.mechanism: Agents with mode: subagent (or mode: all) can be invoked from other agents; delegation is driven by the callee's description field.

tool_restrictions.mechanism: The permission frontmatter map configures ask/allow/deny per tool, replacing the deprecated tools allow/deny map.

providerExtensions.name: Agent mode (primary / subagent / all)
providerExtensions.summary: Frontmatter mode field selects whether the agent is a root primary agent, a subagent invoked by another agent, or both.

providerExtensions.name: Sampling temperature override
providerExtensions.summary: Per-agent sampling temperature via frontmatter temperature field.

providerExtensions.name: top_p sampling override
providerExtensions.summary: Per-agent nucleus sampling top_p value via frontmatter.

providerExtensions.name: Per-step iteration limit
providerExtensions.summary: Frontmatter steps field caps the number of model steps for this agent. Replaces the deprecated maxSteps field.

providerExtensions.name: Per-tool permission overrides
providerExtensions.summary: Frontmatter permission map configures ask/allow/deny behavior per tool, replacing the deprecated tools allow/deny map.

providerExtensions.name: Agent color tag
providerExtensions.summary: Optional color hint for UI display of the agent.

providerExtensions.name: Hidden from pickers
providerExtensions.summary: Boolean hidden flag excludes the agent from interactive selection UIs while still allowing programmatic invocation.
